description: A Web Administrator has been tasked with configuring proactive SSL certificate monitoring in OpManager for three critical external endpoints. Read the target specification at ~/Desktop/ssl_monitor_targets.txt and create three native SSL Certificate Monitors in OpManager for the specified external domains, configuring each with a 30-day expiration warning threshold. Target endpoints: api.manageengine.com, auth.ubuntu.com, en.wikipedia.org (all on port 443). Do NOT create standard URL monitors; you must use the dedicated SSL Certificate monitoring feature. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
